identity.name: Telegram Logger Bot (System)
identity.purpose: A modular system for monitoring, filtering, and logging Telegram communications. Consists of a bot application and an isolated persistence module.

component.name: Application Layer (Root)
component.file: Main entry point. Implements aiogram Dispatcher, event handlers, and business logic. Responsible for Access Control (filtering) and orchestrating data flow to the storage module.
Configuration manager. Loads environment variables, processes ACLs (ALLOWED_USERS, ALLOWED_CHATS), and normalizes Telegram IDs.
Maintenance utility. Exports logged data to JSON or HTML by utilizing the internal logic of the storage module.

component.name: Persistence Layer (Module)
component.folder: Isolated module specialized in parsing Telegram objects and SQLite persistence. Refer to 'tg_bot_history/documentation.ai.xml' for detailed module specs.

access_control.logic: 1. Check if chat_id is in ALLOWED_CHATS or user_id (for private) is in ALLOWED_USERS. 2. If unauthorized in a group: send a farewell message and leave the chat. 3. If unauthorized in private: ignore silently.

logic_flows.integration_flow: 1. 'bot.py' receives an update (Message, EditedMessage, or ChatMemberUpdated). 2. 'bot.py' validates the source against ACLs defined in 'config.py'. 3. If valid, 'bot.py' calls the respective processing function from 'tg_bot_history.collectors'. 4. The DB_PATH constant is passed from the root configuration to the module functions.

maintenance_and_tools.export: The 'dump_db.py' tool provides a relational view of the captured data. It is used for human-readable audits (HTML) and data migration (JSON).
maintenance_and_tools.deployment: Requires a .env file with BOT_TOKEN and DB_PATH. The system uses SQLite WAL mode to allow the dump tool to read while the bot is running.

future_expansion.note: The system is designed to provide structured history context for Large Language Models (LLM). The 'tg_bot_history' module serves as the primary data provider for building LLM prompts based on chat history.
